PC          Instruction         Machine Code
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
0x0000		addi t0,zero,1      00000000000100000000001010010011
0x0004		addi s0,s0,1        00000000000101000000010000010011
0x0008		beq s0,s1,label1    00000000100101000000010001100011
0x000c		beq zero,zero,label4b00000010000000000000000001100011
0x0010		bne s0,s1,8         00000000100101000001010001100011
0x0014		addi t0,zero,3      00000000001100000000001010010011
0x0018		addi s1,s1,1        00000000000101001000010010010011
0x001c		bne s0,s1,label4e   11111110100101000001100011100011
0x0020		addi s1,s1,1        00000000000101001000010010010011
0x0024		addi t0,zero,4      00000000010000000000001010010011
0x0028		addi s0,s0,1        00000000000101000000010000010011
0x002c		bne s0,s1,8         00000000100101000001010001100011
0x0030		addi t0,zero,5      00000000010100000000001010010011
0x0034		addi s1,s1,1        00000000000101001000010010010011
0x0038		addi s1,s1,1        00000000000101001000010010010011
